Fluent Web design alternative for TYUI.

Source of truth:
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/DESIGN.md

Generated files:
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/theme.css
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/component-variants.css
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/design-app.md
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/patterns.md
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/context.json
- design/alternatives/fluent-web/tokens.resolved.json

Use by applying data-design-system="fluent-web" to an app root and importing theme.css before component-variants.css.
